title: CAM, Trilegal, SAM act on Bharti Airtel, Carlyle, Alpha Wave investing $1 billion in Airtel's Nxtra Data
description: Bharti Airtel, Carlyle Group, Alpha Wave Global and Anchorage Capital are set to invest $1 billion into Airtel’s data centre arm, Nxtra Data Limited.Cyril Amarchand Mangaldas is advising the Bharti Group on this investment.The transaction team was led by Ravindra Bandhakavi (Senior Partner), Amarta Roy (Partner) and Anandita Kaushik (Partner), with assistance from Radhika Shukla (Senior Associate), Sudarshan Srikanth (Senior Associate), Associates Aeruva Akash and Rhea Prasad.
